feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Aussiebros, why the hate?
entry.content: Before this game I’ve been aware of this weird idea where Aussies either think we hate each other, or just outright hate us, why? My entire childhood up until adulthood I was led to believe us and Aussies loved each other, but a few years ago upon meeting some learned you guys fucking despise us, more than Canadians seemingly, wtf why? You guys are Crocodile Dundee and Kangaroos, we like that. This game showed a lot of other Americans y’all’s hate as well, and we’re all confused, like the Englis

entry.title: /int/ International: Thirdie bros. Recently because of classes or going out to play football I've bee…
entry.content: Thirdie bros. Recently because of classes or going out to play football I've been in contact with a lot of teenagers. The stories about the kind of stuff that some women do and how a few have unironically reverse harems is really brutal. Also I barely know people of my age who have kids, our fertility rate in the cities should be around 0.7, but rural areas are bumping that number to 1.9. I swear everything is soul crushing these days. t.26

entry.content: >4 That evening, just before bedtime, men from every part of town came to Lot’s house. They stood around the house and called to Lot. They said, 5 “Where are the two men who came to you tonight? Bring them out to us. We want to have sex with them.” 6 Lot went outside and closed the door behind him. 7 He said to the men, “No, my friends, I beg you, please don’t do this evil thing! 8 Look, I have two daughters who have never slept with a man before. I will give my daughters to you. You can do anyt

entry.content: like the classical music that everybody reveres so much today you know the music from the 16,17,1800s that they say is the really good stuff, do you know how many people were writing music during those years? Lots. Most of them you've never heard of Guess who survives? The ones who had hits. Not because they were the best. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #347
entry.content: Momo edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welcome.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I hate all women with a passion. My misogyny runs so deep that merely seeing som…
entry.content: I hate all women with a passion. My misogyny runs so deep that merely seeing someone mention something positive about women or admiration for a female makes me mad. Or just hearing anything not negative or at least neutral about women fills me with a rage that I find impossible to describe. It's akin to helplessness or maybe desperation. But I think it might be a projection of the sinking feeling that every ship I could have boarded has already sailed.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Vulkan is collapsing
entry.content: AMD dropping the ball. Nvidia and Apple pushing for walled APIs. Consoles going extinct. Valve moving away from native APIs. Vulkan is fragmenting and it shows. This is a dire situation, only new manufacturers from China can salvage this!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Thorium fucking ROCKS
entry.content: https://thorium.rocks/ Compiler optimizations include SSE4.2, AVX, AES, and modifications to CFLAGS, LDFLAGS, thinLTO flags, import_instr_limit flags, and PGO, as well as other compiler flags. LLVM LOOP optimizations as -mllvm flags Learn more about these compiler optimizations and how they work Here. UI Changes and Patches for Linux and Windows that fix bugs, enhance useability, and strengthen privacy/security. [/code[ this makes my old machine feel brand new. this shit FLIES.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/..I think my thermostat is trying to kill me
entry.content: Alright /g/, I need actual help and not the usual “lol skill issue” replies because I’m posting this from my car hotspot outside my own house. I built a prototype AI thermostat—yeah, yeah, I know, “why reinvent the Nest,” but this was supposed to be my magnum opus. Adaptive thermal modeling, predictive comfort heuristics, autonomous climate optimization… the whole thing was massively over‑engineered because I wanted it to feel like a real assistant, not just a dumb temperature knob. Well. It’s a

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Laptop
entry.content: I'm in the market for a laptop. Will probably run Linux. What's a non-pozzed option? Are Thinkpads (T line) still good? My last Linux laptop was a T470s, and I got nice mileage out of it. Also should I look at arm processors? They seem to be quite good.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: AM I A MAN CHILD?
entry.content: I was in a relationship with single mother for 8 years. I payed the bills, put food on the table and helped her son. She cheated on me and I’m alone again. I man up, wasted 10 years of life it got me nothing. Motivation videos tell me I need to dust myself off, get up, dust myself off and continue with my life. Society tells me I need to be productive, get married and have responsibilities to be considered “man”. I see women now as nothing but cumdumpsters and the good qualities they have is the

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Amazing Digital Circus
entry.content: Have zero desire to deal with le fandom or whatever bullshit like that, so this is why /trash/ and not /co/. Refused to watch any of it aside from the first episode originally until all episodes were released, which happened the other day so figured it was worth fulfilling on that as I at least it looked like it could be entertaining enough. My knowledge only extends to the content of the series itself. This is a spattering of thoughts, with no regard for spoilers if you give a shit about such.
